title: Johns Hopkins University Names Bad Bunny 2026 Spring Fair Headliner
detail: Johns Hopkins University's student newspaper announces Bad Bunny as the headliner for the 2026 Spring Fair, marking one of the more unusual bookings in the Ivy-adjacent institution's annual festival history. The announcement draws attention as an example of his crossover appeal into academic environments. Tickets are expected to go on sale in late April at starting prices of $45, with approximately 1,500 tickets available. The show is notable amid Bad Bunny's packed world-tour schedule.

sources.name: The Johns Hopkins News-Letter — Spring Fair 2026 Headliner Announced
